name: The amazing digital circus skinpack
author: Cracked_Egg
extended_description: To celebrate the finale of the amazing digital circus having its final release on youtube and netflix, i made this pack in a day. It has every main character from the show, Pomni, Jax, Ragatha, Zooble, Gangle, Kinger and Caine. Along with the three (now absracted) characters shown in flashbacks, Queenie, Kaufmo and ribbit. Enjoy!
